name: luxe-en-vogue-checkout
description: Requires PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY (and optionally PUBLIC_BASE_URL) as env vars — see /api/create-checkout-session.js. Order storage uses Vercel KV (Upstash Redis) — KV_REST_API_URL / KV_REST_API_TOKEN, auto-set once a KV store is attached (Storage tab -> Create Database -> KV -> Connect Project). ADMIN_SECRET guards /api/all-orders, /api/update-order-status, /api/pending-products, /api/approve-product, and /api/reject-product. WhatsApp product uploads need WHATSAPP_VERIFY_TOKEN, WHATSAPP_TOKEN, WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID, and ADMIN_WHATSAPP_NUMBER — see /api/whatsapp-webhook.js. Product photos are stored with Vercel Blob (BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN, auto-set once Blob storage is attached — Storage tab -> Create Database -> Blob -> Connect Project). Sign up / sign in (session-based, stored in the same Vercel KV store) needs GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET for 'Continue with Google' — see /api/auth-google.js and /api/auth-google-callback.js. No new npm dependencies were added: password hashing uses Node's built-in crypto.scrypt and the Google OAuth exchange uses plain fetch calls.
